basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc Degree in Chemistry/Material Science/Nanotechnology or equivalent with First class, GATE or UGC/CSIR-NET
qualification.details: M.Sc Degree in Chemistry/Material Science/Nanotechnology or equivalent with First class or equivalent grade. Must have qualified GATE or UGC/CSIR-NET.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000 per month (first two years) and Rs. 42000 per month (third year) plus HRA.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate Job 2026 Notifi

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc Degree in Chemistry, Material Science, Nanotechnology, or an equivalent field with First Class. Additionally, qualifying GATE or UGC/CSIR-NET is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 37000 per month for the first two years and Rs. 42000 per month for the third year, along with HRA.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position is on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q10. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani).
